args: [Windows.UI.Notifications.ToastNotificationManager, Windows.UI.Notifications, ContentType = WindowsRuntime] | Out-Null; [Windows.UI.Notifications.ToastNotification, Windows.UI.Notifications, ContentType = WindowsRuntime] | Out-Null; [Windows.Data.Xml.Dom.XmlDocument, Windows.Data.Xml.Dom.XmlDocument, ContentType = WindowsRuntime] | Out-Null; $APP_ID = 'OpenCode'; $eventType = '{event}'; $message = '{message}'; $title = switch($eventType) { 'permission' { 'Permission Required' } 'error' { 'Error' } 'complete' { 'Complete' } 'subagent_complete' { 'Subagent Complete' } 'question' { 'Question' } default { $eventType } }; $toastXml = '<toast><visual><binding template="ToastText02"><text id="1">' + $title + '</text><text id="2">' + $message + '</text></binding></visual><audio src="ms-winsoundevent:Notification.Default" silent="true" /></toast>'; $xml = New-Object Windows.Data.Xml.Dom.XmlDocument; $xml.LoadXml($toastXml); $toast = New-Object Windows.UI.Notifications.ToastNotification $xml; $notifier = [Windows.UI.Notifications.ToastNotificationManager]::CreateToastNotifier($APP_ID); $notifier.Show($toast);
